programme.title: Buried Truth of the Maya
programme.desc: Blending wit, wisdom and wanderlust, our adventurous host and team of explorers will mount extreme expeditions to shed new light on some of the planet's greatest mysteries. Each episode will take us past mere myths and legends, utilizing the latest in science and technology to present a new point of view on historical events, megalithic structures and archeological mysteries.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: US Air Flight #1493 (Boeing 737-300) & Skywest Flight #5569 (Fairchild Metroliner) February 1st, 1991 Its a busy night at Los Angeles International Airport, and US Air Flight #1493 is on its final approach. The pilots configure the 737 for landing and although they repeatedly radio the tower for instructions, their calls go unanswered. They finally get clearance just moments before landing, but within seconds of touching down, the aircraft erupts in flames and crashes into an abandoned building. Rescue workers rush to the scene, and as survivors emerge from the inferno, firefighters make a horrifying discovery... Can investigators determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot introduces a new "team" of canine friends to her far-flung Yukon homestead; On a remote island in Newfoundland, Matty makes a big move with a home that is far from new; Billy races to replace his ailing roof before the fast-approaching Canadian winter arrives; and Emilie and Gilbert take to the backwoods on a bush-building adventure they hope will keep them safer from the larger, local fauna.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot searches the vast wilds of the Yukon for the perfect place to build her new northwoods cabin. Matty discovers his Newfoundland homestead is not as ready for the fast-approaching winter as he had hoped. Billy resorts to some old-school techniques to make some new and improved outbuilding upgrades, and Emile & Gilbert take the first step on their journey to build their backwoods family dream home.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: In an airport where time is money, a routine tail-fin repair on a $208 million dollar A330 jet hangs in the balance; two trainee Airside Operations Controllers have to guide multi-million dollar aircraft precisely to their parking stands; and with the airport near full capacity handling 57 million passengers a year, the new $3.2 billion concourse is trialed to test if it's on schedule to receive 15 million new passengers and 33 of the world's biggest passenger jets - the mighty $389 million dollar Airbus A380.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: With over a million people passing through Dubai International Airport each week, keeping passengers on the move is an increasingly difficult challenge for airport staff. Ultimate Airport follows engineers narrowly averting a crisis in the 55 mile (90 km) baggage system; rookie cabin crew find out if they have what it takes to fly, and the construction team behind the new concourse feel the heat as more than 200 volunteers test whether it's ready to be used by the public.

programme.title: Easter Island Unsolved
programme.desc: This is among the most remote inhabited islands on the planet. Rapa Nui, a once vibrant utopian island culture, settled 1000 years ago, with remarkable art and ritual; and then collapse. The show examines the beginning and the end of the Eastern Islanders, through a series of cautionary tales and colorful spectacle. Today, due to rising oceans and coastal erosion, this rare gem and 1,100 moai statue are at risk of disappearing from sight for all time.

programme.title: Buried Truth of the Maya
programme.desc: Blending wit, wisdom and wanderlust, our adventurous host and team of explorers will mount extreme expeditions to shed new light on some of the planet's greatest mysteries. Each episode will take us past mere myths and legends, utilizing the latest in science and technology to present a new point of view on historical events, megalithic structures and archeological mysteries.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are off to the home counties where a 1955 Ford Popular awaits. However, this is no bog-standard classic, it's a highly modified hot-rod with a brute of a V8 engine and a whole host of problems. The car was once the pride and joy of cerebral palsy sufferer Andy, but with so many mechanical troubles his beloved "Pop" has been rotting away in storage with virtually no chance of getting it back on the road. Until, that is, his wife wrote in to Car SOS.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz restore Adam's Datsun 240k Skyline, a rare Japanese classic that hails from the 1970s.After a long spell of ill health Adam's wife is desperate for him to have his beloved car back on the road, but with only two other similar cars currently registered on the road, not only is this the rarest vehicle the Car SOS team has ever taken on, it means part finding is an almost impossible task.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Exodus and the conquest of the land of Canaan are among the Bible's most famous stories. They tell how the Israelites triumphed, with the help of the Ark of the Covenant. The problem is that there is little archaeological evidence that these tales happened exactly as the Bible describes. Across the Holy Land, archaeologists and investigators dig through the ruins of ancient cities to uncover the real world behind the biblical accounts. Just west of Jerusalem, one team explores a cave tomb to reveal evidence for the origins of the Israelites' enemies, the Philistines. In northern Israel, another team excavates the remains of the Canaanite kingdom's mightiest stronghold and finds mysterious Egyptian artifacts that shed new light on the traditional tale of the Israelites' journey to what the Bible calls the Promised Land.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The legend of David and Goliath is one of the Bible's most famous stories. It tells of a battle between a young shepherd boy and a nine-foot-tall warrior. Now, teams of archaeologists investigate the real world behind this epic showdown. At Tel Azekah, excavators uncover the remains of an ancient city, destroyed by a devastating fire. In Egypt, inscriptions from the Temple of Karnak hint at the surprising origins of the Philistines, some of the Bible's most fearsome warriors, and at the ruined city of Gath, excavators uncover a fragment of pottery with two ancient names. Did a real Goliath live in this city?

programme.title: History's Secrets
programme.desc: Mysterious events, compelling figures and great unanswered questions from the past are explored. Most historians have reached a consensus about the way major world events played out. Yet decades after the fact, certain stories remain touched by an air of uncertainty. Investigate the truth behind some of history's greatest events and most iconic people. Discover new clues about the reclusive billionaire Howard Hughes; the CIA's top-secret experiments; the Unabomber and; little known stories from NASA's Apollo missions.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: The Kim Dynasty
programme.desc: For decades, Korea and its people laboured under Japanese imperialist rule. But in 1912, in a small town outside Pyongyang, a child is born - Kim Il Sung, coinciding with an omen of imperialism's doom. This is the story of how an unknown guerrilla fighter rises to power, takes complete control of his country and makes himself a god in the eyes of his people. Recounted through firsthand testimony and expertly curated archive, "Kingdom of the Kims" explores Sung's early days in power, how he starts the Korean War, establishes gulags for anyone who could be "hostile", tries to assassinate the President of South Korea, and plays a dangerous game of brinksmanship with the United States, including capturing a US Navy ship - the USS Pueblo - taking American sailors prisoner, and the infamous tree-cutting axe murders in the Demilitarised Zone.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: The Hollywood ending: During one of the bloodiest periods of conflict in the Middle East, a CIA officer faces the ultimate test of trust. Recruiting a mole inside al-Qaida is only the beginning; the real challenge is keeping him alive. Intelligence alone won't win the battle. The true test lies in safeguarding the life of a man who holds the key to countless operations. As danger closes in from every direction, loyalty, strategy and courage collide in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: The hunt for a high-value target: The unforeseen arrest of an American operative in Pakistan threatens to unravel one of the most secretive and high-stakes missions in CIA history. As international tensions flare and political pressure mounts, the experienced chief of station finds himself at the center of a dangerous storm. With limited allies and a target on his back, the clock is ticking. He must navigate a volatile diplomatic crisis while staying focused on the mission — capturing the U.S.'s most wanted fugitive — before everything falls apart.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Flying over the Himalayan foothills on a short hop from the Nepali capital Kathmandu to the tourist city of Pokhara, Yeti Airlines Flight 691 is cleared to land. And while a passenger live streams the final approach—and just seconds from the runway—the plane stalls and crashes into a gorge. Destroyed on impact, investigators find a scene of utter annihilation at the crash site. Eyewitness video gives them their first lead—the aircraft came in at a severe left bank. And the wreckage indicates the engines were in the feathered position, and therefore unable to provide thrust. A deep dive soon proves their was nothing wrong with the plane. And when investigators listen to the CVR, they're stunned to uncover overloaded pilots and a fatal case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: August 16th, 1987 Northwest Airlines Flight #255 is on the tarmac at Detroit Metropolitan Airport. The pilots are bound for Phoenix, Arizona, but first they have to find their runway. Controllers have given them a last minute change and the pilots are having a hard time locating the entrance to their runway. Finally, 45 minutes behind schedule, the pilots taxi the DC-9 into position. The airplane is soon roaring down the runway at 95 miles an hour (150 kilometers and hour). Captain John Maus pulls back on his control column, but the plane barely manages to get off the ground before it hits a light pole, slams into a building, and disintegrates on a highway. This is the second-deadliest airplane disaster in US history... But can investigators determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Maya Snake Kings
programme.desc: Fascinating documentary series from National Geographic that sheds new light on the mystifying Maya civilisation. With astounding new evidence, scientists, archaeologists and historians have uncovered the complexity and advancement of this Central American civilisation, which lived across southeastern Mexico, Belize, Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala. These experts have used advanced technology to scour the jungles of Guatemala, discovering approximately 60,000 new structures that reveal the meandering network of infrastructure which connected the Maya people. One of the ruling dynasties of this ancient era were the Snake Kings, who until recently were unknown. These intriguing new discoveries reveal the extent of the Snake Kings power as they even conquered Tikal, the greatest city in Mayan history.

programme.title: Cleopatra's Final Secret
programme.desc: Archaeologist Kathleen Martinez is leading a thrilling detective hunt on land and underwater, to unearth the final pieces of the puzzle that will unlock the story of Cleopatra's last days. Armed with the latest technology and the unparalleled skills of explorer Bob Ballard, she is guaranteed to make extraordinary discoveries. This could be the find of the century: Cleopatra's Lost Tomb.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: The Fall Of Osama Bin Laden
programme.desc: Journalist Peter Bergen returns to investigate the United States intelligence operation to hunt down and kill the world's most wanted terrorist. Take a deep dive into critical intel gathered by Navy SEALs on hard drives and in a collection of letters and journals confiscated from bin Laden's Abbottabad compound.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Tracking the butcher: A father's mission to bring justice to one of the most feared members of the Taliban reaches a turning point when a teenage boy within his inner circle is captured during a raid. With this unexpected breakthrough and the aid of the CIA's most advanced covert tracking technology, agents close in on the elusive figure known as "The Butcher." What began as a distant mission for justice now inches toward a final resolution.

programme.title: Airport Security: Colombia
programme.desc: El Dorado International Airport officials must put their sagacity and experience to the test in order to detect the boldest and most original attempts at breaking the law that take place at the airport. In this episode, three passengers are caught carrying a total of 120 cocaine capsules inside their bodies and they in turn confess the dramatic circumstances they claim pushed them into committing a crime. Immigration agents face the challenge of deporting eight Bangladeshi nationals who are traveling using false documentation. Also, a young man shows great imagination when he hides a stash of cocaine in an unexpected part of his luggage. And a Dutch passenger dares to carry large quantities of cocaine in the fake bottom of both his suitcases. Meanwhile, customs officials work tirelessly to stop undeclared cash from entering the country, as it is sometimes linked to criminal activity.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Maya Snake Kings
programme.desc: Fascinating documentary series from National Geographic that sheds new light on the mystifying Maya civilisation. With astounding new evidence, scientists, archaeologists and historians have uncovered the complexity and advancement of this Central American civilisation, which lived across southeastern Mexico, Belize, Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala. These experts have used advanced technology to scour the jungles of Guatemala, discovering approximately 60,000 new structures that reveal the meandering network of infrastructure which connected the Maya people. One of the ruling dynasties of this ancient era were the Snake Kings, who until recently were unknown. These intriguing new discoveries reveal the extent of the Snake Kings power as they even conquered Tikal, the greatest city in Mayan history.

programme.title: Cleopatra's Final Secret
programme.desc: Archaeologist Kathleen Martinez is leading a thrilling detective hunt on land and underwater, to unearth the final pieces of the puzzle that will unlock the story of Cleopatra's last days. Armed with the latest technology and the unparalleled skills of explorer Bob Ballard, she is guaranteed to make extraordinary discoveries. This could be the find of the century: Cleopatra's Lost Tomb.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Flying over the Himalayan foothills on a short hop from the Nepali capital Kathmandu to the tourist city of Pokhara, Yeti Airlines Flight 691 is cleared to land. And while a passenger live streams the final approach—and just seconds from the runway—the plane stalls and crashes into a gorge. Destroyed on impact, investigators find a scene of utter annihilation at the crash site. Eyewitness video gives them their first lead—the aircraft came in at a severe left bank. And the wreckage indicates the engines were in the feathered position, and therefore unable to provide thrust. A deep dive soon proves their was nothing wrong with the plane. And when investigators listen to the CVR, they're stunned to uncover overloaded pilots and a fatal case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: August 16th, 1987 Northwest Airlines Flight #255 is on the tarmac at Detroit Metropolitan Airport. The pilots are bound for Phoenix, Arizona, but first they have to find their runway. Controllers have given them a last minute change and the pilots are having a hard time locating the entrance to their runway. Finally, 45 minutes behind schedule, the pilots taxi the DC-9 into position. The airplane is soon roaring down the runway at 95 miles an hour (150 kilometers and hour). Captain John Maus pulls back on his control column, but the plane barely manages to get off the ground before it hits a light pole, slams into a building, and disintegrates on a highway. This is the second-deadliest airplane disaster in US history... But can investigators determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: In the Yukon, Margot finds inspiration for her cabin building project in the most unlikely of places. Billy races to make repairs to his Gaspe dream home before the fast-approaching Canadian winter arrives. With the help of a colorful neighbor, Matty breaks ground on a new wing for his Newfoundland cabin. Emilie & Gilbert take to the forests of Northern Ontario in search of essential resources for their fledgling northern home.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: In the Yukon, Margot takes her fledgling dog sled team on their inaugural multi-day trapping trip. Billy takes to the woods in search of a more traditional way of living off and on the land. Matty goes all in on the renovation of his ancient Newfoundland seaside home, while Emilie and Gilbert take advantage of an early freeze-up and head out trapping, in search of an essential resource that makes its winter home beneath the ice. Final

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Dubai International is in the global race to be the world's biggest airport. A massive new concourse for the world's largest fleet of A380's uses over a 150 million man-hours and 930 thousand cubic meters of concrete. Unafraid of new challenges, the airport was the first ever to close two runways back to back for construction. In the words of its Engineering CEO, "the bar is getting higher and higher." There is no room for failure in Dubai.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: More than a million passengers pass through Dubai International Airport every week. Behind the scenes 60,000 people from across the globe are hard at work. From ensuring the safety of the runway surface to dealing with drunken passengers, this episode of "Ultimate Airport" offers a rare chance to get to know the unsung men and women carrying out the often overlooked but vital tasks that make this multi-billion dollar airport run smoothly.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Maya Snake Kings
programme.desc: Fascinating documentary series from National Geographic that sheds new light on the mystifying Maya civilisation. With astounding new evidence, scientists, archaeologists and historians have uncovered the complexity and advancement of this Central American civilisation, which lived across southeastern Mexico, Belize, Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala. These experts have used advanced technology to scour the jungles of Guatemala, discovering approximately 60,000 new structures that reveal the meandering network of infrastructure which connected the Maya people. One of the ruling dynasties of this ancient era were the Snake Kings, who until recently were unknown. These intriguing new discoveries reveal the extent of the Snake Kings power as they even conquered Tikal, the greatest city in Mayan history.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. Unraveling the complex mystery is a painstaking process that takes months—and sometimes years—of detective work. The twisted wreckage at the crash site tells part of the story; investigators can use it to learn about the final seconds of a flight and rule out mechanical failures. The flight data and cockpit voice recorders are critical, but they don't always reveal what happened. It almost always takes a tragic combination of factors to bring down an airplane.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys across islands, mountains and olive groves to reveal why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. From sailing old trade routes through the Aegean to marvelling at the optical illusions hidden in the Parthenon, she explores how ideas were shaped by the dramatic landscape and how a mastery of maths, architecture and navigation fuelled a golden age of progress and innovation. Exploring the threads between ancient and modern Greece, she joins a family of olive farmers in Crete preserving centuries-old traditions, and visits the mountaintop monasteries in Meteora, where nuns safeguard classical texts. In the coastal town of Galaxidi, she's swept up in a riotous flour-throwing festival that blends ancient myth with modern identity.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Vietnam, a land of staggering natural beauty, ancient traditions and some of the fastest growing skylines on earth. Over 1,600 km from the vibrant South to the historic North, she uncovers the story of the country's remarkable post-war transformation. She immerses herself in the moped chaos in Ho Chi Minh City, helps with a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and takes a restorative spa bath in the misty hilltops of Sapa. She ushers in the New Year with a local family celebrating the Tet festival and learns how a beloved dish, pho, tells a story of identity. In each place she visits, she meets characters whose lives have been shaped by both war and renewal. What emerges is a nation embracing change, where striking contrasts are balanced by a spirit of cooperation and strong family bonds.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Iraq, archaeologists investigate the truth behind the legendary city of Babylon. First discovered in the 1800s, this vast ancient metropolis was home to extraordinary structures and a long line of notorious rulers. Babylon is one of the most famous cities in the Bible, mentioned hundreds of times, from the first book of Genesis to Revelation. But why did it have such a hold over the writers of the Bible? International teams of experts investigate ancient cities across Mesopotamia, which could shed light on this mystery. From the cultural wonders and dramatic history of Nineveh to the extraordinary ziggurat at Dur-Kurigalzu, exploring these sites helps reveal the real world of Babylon and illuminate why it was such a source of inspiration and fascination for the Bible's authors.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The book of Revelation tells of an apocalyptic battle of good versus evil at the end of the world. It says the battle will happen in a place called Armageddon, but Armageddon is no myth. It takes its name from a real ancient settlement: Megiddo. So, what happened here to inspire a Biblical tale of such drama? Archaeologists believe that a series of battles took place here over several centuries, which may have given Megiddo a reputation for violence, turmoil and war as a series of powerful civilizations claimed it as their own. The Egyptians, Assyrians and — according to the Bible — the Israelites all flattened and then rebuilt the city. Finally, it was the site of a battle between King Josiah, the last of the line of King David, and the Egyptians, resulting in Josiah's death. Could these events be the origins of the Armageddon story?

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: An oversized billboard falls down in Mumbai, causing death and destruction. In Minnesota, too much snow leads to roofs collapsing. A volcano erupts, creating widespread infrastructure damage. A bridge in Pittsburgh plummets to the valley below, taking with it cars and a bus. While digging new subway tunnels in São Paulo, the ground caves in, not once, but twice. Home renovations spark outrage, and eerie abandoned skyscrapers, or "ghost-scrapers," remain unfinished.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: One of the world's deadliest natural disasters wreaks havoc across the Spanish province of Valencia in a flash. Cable car rides go from scenic to scary in a snap, an airport parking garage in the UK goes up in flames, and the canopy of a Serbian train station comes down with a bang. A large Romanian bridge has even bigger construction problems, and a few British bike paths have questionable design decisions.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: In Thailand, elevated highways keep falling down. A fire breaks out at a bakery in a Uruguayan shopping mall, and a bridge in Colombia collapses just before construction is finished. London's skyline has become a buffet of unsightly skyscrapers, and trucks everywhere are overloaded. Without proper shoring, a building in Iowa crumbles and houses in Rodanthe keep plunging into the ocean.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. Unraveling the complex mystery is a painstaking process that takes months—and sometimes years—of detective work. The twisted wreckage at the crash site tells part of the story; investigators can use it to learn about the final seconds of a flight and rule out mechanical failures. The flight data and cockpit voice recorders are critical, but they don't always reveal what happened. It almost always takes a tragic combination of factors to bring down an airplane.

programme.title: Ghost Ships of the Great Lakes: Lost Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: The tempestuous Great Lakes are full of wrecks lost to the depths and time. In this update, new science reveals some of the exciting Great Lakes ship discoveries over the last decade, and allows for the exploration and recovery of recently discovered wrecks, including a mysterious group of ships that haven't been seen since 1914.

programme.title: Buried Secrets of Cordoba
programme.desc: National Geographic follows archaeologist and explorer Fabio Amador on a fascinating voyage to unveil the ancient mysteries that lie beneath the modern streets of Cordoba, which dates back some 2,000 years. Fabio joins archaeologists and historians in the field as they use state-of-the-art technologies to discover and recreate Cordoba's forgotten past.

programme.title: Endurance
programme.desc: In a legendary feat of leadership and perseverance, Antarctic explorer Ernest Shackleton kept his crew alive for over a year despite losing their ship in frigid pack ice. A century later, a team of explorers sets out to find the sunken ship. These landmark expeditions, bound by shared grit and determination, bookend one of history's greatest sagas of survival and the power of the human spirit.

programme.title: Titanic: The Digital Resurrection
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge scanning technology and state-of-the-art CGI, a team of experts produces the first high-res, 3D digital twin of the wreck of the Titanic. Through an unprecedented immersive investigation, the team reveals the ship's fateful final moments, the heroics and cowardice of those on board, and the truth about how the "unsinkable" ship sank.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Airport employees reunite travelers with their lost items, including a pair of ornate Shriners fezzes, a bride's pearl necklace, and a $12,000 Jaeger watch. In New Orleans, a mom retrieves the wallet she left on the plane after buying snacks for her kids, and in Alabama shoppers from around the country line up for hours to enter Unclaimed Baggage's giant annual sale of lost ski equipment.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Airport workers undertake true detective work to trace the owner of a duffel bag brimming with old family photos. A woman searches for Christmas decorations that are part of a family gifting tradition. In Tampa, the lost and found department donates items to a local women's shelter, including a $700 purse. In New Orleans, a young man loses his wallet upon arriving for a college tour.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Space shuttle Columbia, the Deepwater Horizon oil rig, and the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear power plant are three major disasters linked to engineering and design flaws. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design choices that turned failures into catastrophes. What turned Columbia's return into a disaster? Why didn't the oil rig's final defenses hold? And how did a massive wave defeat emergency backups?

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: A construction crane in the heart of New York City, Italy's iconic Morandi Bridge, and a multistory department store in Korea — three major disasters linked to engineering errors. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design flaws that spiraled into structural collapse. How does a series of oversights, design flaws, and negligent decisions lead to deadly catastrophes?

programme.title: Ghost Ships of the Great Lakes: Lost Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: The tempestuous Great Lakes are full of wrecks lost to the depths and time. In this update, new science reveals some of the exciting Great Lakes ship discoveries over the last decade, and allows for the exploration and recovery of recently discovered wrecks, including a mysterious group of ships that haven't been seen since 1914.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot and her canine friends continue their pioneering trapping adventure, pushing deeper into the rugged Yukon backcountry. Desperate for building materials for his island homestead, Matty takes to the seas in search of timber. Billy turns his attention to fixing one of the most essential of all backwoods buildings: the outhouse. Emilie and Gilbert take their daughter Annie on her first hunting trip.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot and a "special friend" make a final push to complete her cabin before winter fully sets in. Despite a big dump of snow, Billy heads into the bush to embark on an ambitious bridge building project. Matty enlists a "ringer" from his past to help him beat out a fast-approaching storm. And Emilie and Gilbert make a harrowing journey into the backcountry to deliver precious cargo, essential for the completion of their Northwoods dream home.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: To maintain its place as one of the busiest airports in the world, Dubai International needs to run like clockwork. Failure in any single department can have major consequences across the whole airport. This episode follows an emergency in air traffic control that leads to a runway closure, a huge task to re-number every departure gate in the airport while it is operational, and the mounting tension on the building site of a new $3.2 billion terminal extension - built specifically to accommodate the A380, the world's biggest passenger airliner.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: To maintain its place as one of the busiest airports in the world, Dubai International needs to run like clockwork. Among the daily challenges for the 60,000 staff who keep the airport on track and on time: Duty Manager Khalil has to help a family stranded in the terminal because they missed their flight but cant afford to buy new tickets; Service Controller Nargis must free a cargo of meat thats shifted during a flight and is now stuck in the desert heat; and CEO of Dubai Aviation Engineering Projects Suzanne Al Anani is racing to complete the new $3.2 billion Concourse A with a crucial inspection by a member of the emirates royal family just a week away.

programme.title: Ghost Ships of the Great Lakes: Lost Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: The tempestuous Great Lakes are full of wrecks lost to the depths and time. programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa Compilation
programme.desc: Rhinos, Koalas and Bears... Oh My!. Journey through Zoo Tampa's Asia and Australia exhibits as a pair of clouded leopards move into their new home and a sun bear goes to the dentist.

programme.title: Heartland Docs
programme.desc: In picturesque rural Nebraska, husband and wife veterinary team Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder live and work at the center of America's food chain, where the livelihoods of Midwestern farmers connect to families nationwide. Along with their two sons, Charlie and Chase, the Schroeder family is always on the go as their veterinary practice cares for the region's many animals in need. From winter blizzards to spring tornadoes and blistering summer heat waves, Drs. Ben and Erin overcome the obstacles with skill and heart.

programme.title: Dragons Uncovered
programme.desc: The Komodo Dragon has captured our imaginations for over a century, yet so much about this incredible lizard remains a mystery. A creature with survival skills and physical characteristics seen in apex predators across the animal kingdom, and the ability to take down predators ten times its size. The secrets of the Komodo Dragon are revealed.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: Large carnivores such as leopards, lions and hyenas are in constant competition for their next meal for their pack in Zambia's Luangwa Valley. Following the lives of the wise old leopard Kamuti who rained over the prime territory in the Luangwa Valley for 10 years, a six-week-old lion cub and a clan of spotted hyenas, this documentary series allows audiences to see these magnificent animals like never before. With up-close imagery of animals existing within Luangwa Valley and their life in the wild, feel a part of the pack with Africa's Hunters.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: Large carnivores such as leopards, lions and hyenas are in constant competition for their next meal for their pack in Zambia's Luangwa Valley. programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how wolf packs hunt prey, offering new perspectives on the way they work together to bring down large bison and musk oxen.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: Large carnivores such as leopards, lions and hyenas are in constant competition for their next meal for their pack in Zambia's Luangwa Valley. programme.title: When Sharks Attack... And Why
programme.desc: On Indonesias island of Bali, remote Balian Beach boasts black sand and idyllic sunsets. In 2010, the peace enjoyed by visitors and residents alike was suddenly shattered by a shocking shark attack the first ever recorded along its coast. After six more attacks occur at the same beach, experts investigate what has changed at Balian. What makes this small stretch of black sand the most dangerous beach in all of Bali?

programme.title: When Sharks Attack... And Why
programme.desc: A frightening yearly phenomenon plagues the waters of Hawaii - every October, shark attacks here more than double. Residents and tourists alike are baffled by the annual uptick, which threatens the peaceful reputation of this tropical paradise. Investigators are on the case, exploring the islands volcanic geography, exotic marine life, and human influence. Whats behind the mysterious occurrence, dubbed Sharktober?

programme.title: Serengeti Speed Queen
programme.desc: Nzuri is the Speed Queen of the Serengeti - but being fast isn't enough. She's constantly bullied by hyenas on the grassland and hunted by lions in the marsh. When two of her cubs are killed, the family is exiled to the transition forest. There, she learns to adapt her hunting methods and adds strategy to speed in order to outwit her enemies and steer her remaining cubs successfully to adulthood.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Spring rains bring new opportunities and hope to the land of the Iberian lynx.

programme.title: Cat Wars: Lion vs Cheetah
programme.desc: Caught on tape in Africa's wild Serengeti is a stunning act of violence between two top predators. Three cheetahs are brutally attacked by two male lions - the first time an attack like this has ever been filmed. Now, filmmaker Leo Kuenkel, who witnessed the attack, is trying to make sense of it. Was this a once-in-a-lifetime "perfect storm" event? Or do these iconic African cats have a deep-set, sinister reason to fight to the death?

programme.title: Serengeti Speed Queen
programme.desc: Nzuri is the Speed Queen of the Serengeti - but being fast isn't enough. She's constantly bullied by hyenas on the grassland and hunted by lions in the marsh. There, she learns to adapt her hunting methods and adds strategy to speed in order to outwit her enemies and steer her remaining cubs successfully to adulthood.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Spring rains bring new opportunities and hope to the land of the Iberian lynx.

programme.title: Asia's Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Across Asia, young animals are born into a battle for survival and each day brings a new set of dangers. Macaques embark on treacherous journeys to find food. An adolescent leopard struggles while learning to hunt. Though they will grow to be apex predators, Komodo dragon hatchlings flee their cannibalistic elders. The risks are great and the reward even greater: the continuation of their species.

programme.title: Asia's Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Mountain Survivors. Asia's highlands are home to some of the world's harshest environments and the highest living species in the world have had to adapt in unique ways in order to survive at high altitude.

programme.title: Cat Wars: Lion vs Cheetah
programme.desc: Caught on tape in Africa's wild Serengeti is a stunning act of violence between two top predators. Three cheetahs are brutally attacked by two male lions - the first time an attack like this has ever been filmed. Now, filmmaker Leo Kuenkel, who witnessed the attack, is trying to make sense of it. Was this a once-in-a-lifetime "perfect storm" event? Or do these iconic African cats have a deep-set, sinister reason to fight to the death?

programme.title: Planet Carnivore: Perfect Killers
programme.desc: Great white sharks, polar bears, lions and brown bears battle rivals and the elements to maintain their positions at the top of the food chain.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Whale
programme.desc: Intelligent, cultured and deadly, the killer whale dominates every ocean on earth and as our planet changes, this top predator changes with it.

programme.title: Jaguar: Jungle Icon of Guyana
programme.desc: A young jaguar is about to embark on the most important mission of his life: to strike out and find a kingdom of his own.

programme.title: Serengeti Speed Queen
programme.desc: Nzuri is the Speed Queen of the Serengeti - but being fast isn't enough. She's constantly bullied by hyenas on the grassland and hunted by lions in the marsh. When two of her cubs are killed, the family is exiled to the transition forest. There, she learns to adapt her hunting methods and adds strategy to speed in order to outwit her enemies and steer her remaining cubs successfully to adulthood.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol

programme.title: World's Weirdest
programme.desc: World's Weirdest is a documentary series revolving around the strangest, freakiest, weirdest animals and their behaviors in the animal kingdom. Take this amazing journey to the animal world and have a look at creatures who survive in extreme environments, alien-looking body parts and camouflage, fish that can change its sex, toads that explode, koalas and their disgusting diet and all kinds of other weirdest creatures Mother Nature has to offer.

programme.title: South America's Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival.

There, she learns to adapt her hunting methods and adds strategy to speed in order to outwit her enemies and steer her remaining cubs successfully to adulthood.

programme.title: Planet Carnivore: Perfect Killers
programme.desc: Great white sharks, polar bears, lions and brown bears battle rivals and the elements to maintain their positions at the top of the food chain.

programme.title: World's Weirdest
programme.desc: World's Weirdest is a documentary series revolving around the strangest, freakiest, weirdest animals and their behaviors in the animal kingdom. Take this amazing journey to the animal world and have a look at creatures who survive in extreme environments, alien-looking body parts and camouflage, fish that can change its sex, toads that explode, koalas and their disgusting diet and all kinds of other weirdest creatures Mother Nature has to offer.

programme.title: Cat Wars: Lion vs Cheetah
programme.desc: Caught on tape in Africa's wild Serengeti is a stunning act of violence between two top predators. Three cheetahs are brutally attacked by two male lions - the first time an attack like this has ever been filmed. Now, filmmaker Leo Kuenkel, who witnessed the attack, is trying to make sense of it. Was this a once-in-a-lifetime "perfect storm" event? Or do these iconic African cats have a deep-set, sinister reason to fight to the death?

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Spring rains bring new opportunities and hope to the land of the Iberian lynx.

programme.title: Asia's Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Across Asia, young animals are born into a battle for survival and each day brings a new set of dangers. Macaques embark on treacherous journeys to find food. An adolescent leopard struggles while learning to hunt. Though they will grow to be apex predators, Komodo dragon hatchlings flee their cannibalistic elders. The risks are great and the reward even greater: the continuation of their species.

programme.title: Asia's Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Mountain Survivors. Asia's highlands are home to some of the world's harshest environments and the highest living species in the world have had to adapt in unique ways in order to survive at high altitude.

programme.title: Serengeti Speed Queen
programme.desc: Nzuri is the Speed Queen of the Serengeti - but being fast isn't enough. She's constantly bullied by hyenas on the grassland and hunted by lions in the marsh. There, she learns to adapt her hunting methods and adds strategy to speed in order to outwit her enemies and steer her remaining cubs successfully to adulthood.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Spring rains bring new opportunities and hope to the land of the Iberian lynx.

programme.title: Asia's Wild Secrets

An adolescent leopard struggles while learning to hunt. Though they will grow to be apex predators, Komodo dragon hatchlings flee their cannibalistic elders. The risks are great and the reward even greater: the continuation of their species.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack... And Why
programme.desc: The South Pacific island of New Caledonia is a tropical paradise where sharks and humans usually coexist, peacefully. But in 2016, all of that changes. Sharks attack five beachgoers, resulting in two fatalities. Experts from across the globe join forces to investigate a variety of possible causes, including the islands unique marine landscape, the rise in aquatic watersports, and even a lone shark, gone rogue.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack... And Why
programme.desc: Charleston, South Carolina is renowned for its hospitality; but beginning in 2013, its resident sharks - werent quite as welcoming. Over two summers, five beachgoers are bitten within a 22-mile stretch of coastline. Scientists are on a mission to discover the reason behind the mysterious spike, examining the impact of beach rejuvenation, local reptile behavior, drought, and even a new shark species.

programme.title: Attack of the Big Cats
programme.desc: There are nearly 40 different species of cats running around out there, but only four make it into the big cat club. The lion, tiger, leopard and jaguar. And they're armed with an arsenal of weapons and bulk to back up one hell of an attitude. In their world, nothing is small and many things are surprising. So get ready to find out what really makes a big cat a big cat. It's not always all about size, you know.

programme.title: Serengeti Speed Queen
programme.desc: Nzuri is the Speed Queen of the Serengeti - but being fast isn't enough. She's constantly bullied by hyenas on the grassland and hunted by lions in the marsh. When two of her cubs are killed, the family is exiled to the transition forest. There, she learns to adapt her hunting methods and adds strategy to speed in order to outwit her enemies and steer her remaining cubs successfully to adulthood.

programme.title: Cecil: The Legacy of A King
programme.desc: Hwange's lions are rumored to be some of the biggest wild lions on the planet. One magnificent beast was destined to become one of Africa's most famous animals. He was known as Cecil. While his demise at the hand of hunters was splashed across the media, sparking fury in all who heard his tale, Cecil's story before he was posthumously iconized is worthy of celebrating.

programme.title: Attack of the Big Cats
programme.desc: There are nearly 40 different species of cats running around out there, but only four make it into the big cat club. The lion, tiger, leopard and jaguar. programme.title: Cat Wars: Lion vs Cheetah

Was this a once-in-a-lifetime "perfect storm" event? Or do these iconic African cats have a deep-set, sinister reason to fight to the death?

programme.title: Venom Files - Anatomy of a Snake Bite
programme.desc: Millions are bitten by snakes each year, yet their venom evolved for hunting, not harming humans. Explore the fascinating and deadly adaptations of the king cobra, black mamba, inland taipan, puff adder, saw-scaled viper, Mozambique spitting cobra and the fearsome boomslang. Journey from India's vibrant villages to Africa's wild bush and Australia's outback to witness how venom paralyzes, digests and protects. Discover why every snakebite is different — and how our worlds collide in surprising ways. Each snake's venom tells a story, engineered to hunt, defend and survive. But as humans and snakes collide, the chemistry that once kept balance now brings catastrophe. "Venom Files" reveals nature's deadliest assassins.

programme.title: Cecil: The Legacy of A King
programme.desc: Hwange's lions are rumored to be some of the biggest wild lions on the planet. One magnificent beast was destined to become one of Africa's most famous animals. He was known as Cecil. While his demise at the hand of hunters was splashed across the media, sparking fury in all who heard his tale, Cecil's story before he was posthumously iconized is worthy of celebrating.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration. Herbivores once again bound across the plains, but hunters have been slower to return, leaving the park out of balance...until now!

programme.title: Wild Hunters: Deadly Killers of Africa
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. Journey across Africa exploring the continent's most iconic and deadliest predators. These African stories are a show of raw power, strength and endurance. An awe-inspiring display of the fierce, everyday battles fought in the wild.

programme.title: Jaguars vs. Crocs
programme.desc: Veteran wildlife photographer Steve Winter and cameraman Bertie Gregory capture the remarkable lives of Jaguars in the Pantanal of Brazil. A mother jaguar teaches her cub survival while a determined male jaguar named Scarface dives headfirst into the river to tackle the deadliest of opponents - 6-foot long caiman. Clever capybaras and playful giant otters stick with their family members to avoid being jaguar dinner.

programme.title: Attack of the Big Cats

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how lions hunt large prey like buffalo and zebra, offering new perspectives on the way these predators stalk, chase and kill. A lone lioness relies on cunning to feed her newborn cubs, whilst a fearless pride tries to take down the biggest prey of all, a giant African elephant.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how cheetahs hunt their prey, offering new perspectives on the tactics employed by these expert predators when stalking, chasing and bringing down antelope and wildebeest. Following a young cheetah mother over 18-months as she teaches her three cubs the secrets of the hunt.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vecākus pārsteidz aizvien vairāku reklāmas izkārtņu parādīšanās gar viņu ceļu. Gaisma no reklāmām ir tik spoža, ka naktī vairs nevar saskatīt zvaigznes un visur ir tik daudz stabu! Pietiks! Ģimenei jārīkojas! // Barbalala vēlas kļūt par kovbojmeiteni un Barbazū ir apņēmies viņai palīdzēt. Lai to panāktu, viņai jāiemācās aprūpēt govis un bulli. Tas nav viegli, bet, ja viņa pacentīsies, viņa būs lieliska kovbojmeitene.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pastāsta pārējiem, cik vareni bija Da Vinči izgudrojumi un nu katrs grib izgudrot ko savu. Ģēniju ir maz, bet ir jautri izgudrot. // Bērniem jāizvēlas - doties baseinā vai izbraukt ar riteņiem. Uzreiz izveidojas divas frontes un tikai Barbazū spēj nosvērt izvēles svarus.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērniem patīk nakts pasaciņas, bet ne tad, ja tās visu laiku atkārtojas. Barbabella pavada nemierīgu nakti kukaiņu dēļ.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbatētis un Barbamamma atgriežas pie koka, zem kura piedzima. Tas ir sliktā stāvoklī. Viņiem tas steidzami jāglābj.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad stirnai Podziņai jāšķērso Celtnieklīča lidostas skrejceļš, Rabls un komanda zina, kas jābūvē. Rabls un komanda uzbūvē milzu skrituļdēli tantes Celtnes un Rivera šovam. Taču, kad tas zaudē kontroli, suņiem jādzenas pakaļ!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcim vajadzīga pasta nodaļa! Bet, kad celtni apsēž vāveres, suņiem jāizdomā risinājums. Rabla komanda izmanto savas būvniecības prasmes, lai pārveidotu super auto mazgātavu un nomazgātu fermeres Zojas sušķīgos dzīvniekus.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu. Barbabo nav iedvesmas, tāpēc vairs nespēj radīt. Visa ģimene palīdz, iesakot jaunas zīmējumu tēmas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims nolemj pierādīt, ka Kajas tētis ir kapteinis Dinostārs. Tims cenšas atpūsties, bet Tijai ir citi plāni. Tims nopērk labākos cepumus pilsētā, bet drīz saprot, ka citiem tos vajag vairāk nekā viņam.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Karls atver smūtiju kafejnīcu. Kad sākas kokosriekstu haoss, palīgā steidz Rabla komanda. Rabls ar komandu strādā pie tā, lai izglābtu Čārdžera dzimšanas dienas ballīti!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni Gabrielam vēlas sarīkot lielisku pludmales dienu, ieskaitot braucienu ar panorāmas ratu! Tā kā fermeres Zojas lopiņiem jāatpūšas, kucēni uzbūvē vietu jogas nodarbībām.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš palīdz pūķītei Svītijai iemācīties lidot un atgriezties pie vecākiem Mākoņu alās. Kad Lielā Sarkanā Cāļa burvju triks liek Karalienei un Garnadzim samainīties vietām, Dora un Zābaciņš palīdz viņus pārvērst atpakaļ!

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vērojot zvaignzes Barbatētis un Lolita pamana lidojošo šķivīti un steidz pamodināt visu ģimeni. Izrādās, ka ciemos atlidojuši draugi, kuriem līdzi ir lielkājains mazulis, kurš pēkšņi uzradās viņu planētā. Ģimene ar kosmosa kuģi dodas mazuļa planētas meklējumos. // Barbatētis cer, ka viņi drīz atradīs mazuļa planētu. Bet ne viss iet pēc plāna un viņi nolaižas uz ļoti dīvainas planētas. Kā viņi tiks prom un vai atradīs mazuļa planētu?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbatētis un Barbamamma paziņo bērniem, ka divatā dosies atpūsties uz Lieldienu salu. Barbabērni, dvīņi un Stingrā kungs dodas izbraucienā ar jahtu.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Kaja meklē pludmalē apraktos niekus. Tims atbrīvojas no vecajām lietām, bet drīz saprot, ka ne visam vieta miskastē. Tims, Tija un Tomijs cenšas pārliecināt mammu un tēti par labu mīlulim.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija nevar izlemt, ko dāvināt omītei. Tims uzņem pats savu Kapteiņa Dinozvaigznes filmu. Tims izliekas, lai pierādītu, ka ir tikpat foršs, cik Kajas brālēns.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora uzzina, ka viņas vecmamma nav svinējusi savus Pieaugšanas svētkus, un sarīko viņai pārsteiguma ballīti ar īpašu kleitu, diadēmu un kurpēm! Doras draugam Koko nav aizraujoša stāsta, ar ko izklaidēt biedrus, tāpēc viņi dodas pie Pastāstu koka!

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo nīkst no garlaicības, jo brāļi un māsas ir aizņemti un negrib ar viņu spēlēties.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Savā pirmajā Halovīnā Krokodilkungs pārģērbjas par Superkrokodilu un cenšas attaisnot savu jauno identitāti. Deizija un Krokodilkungs apsola Floresas kundzei rūpēties par viņas dārgo augu, bet visu laiku atliek to uz vēlāku.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad vējaina diena traucē būvēt saldējuma veikalu, Rabls, Miksa un Čārdžers ķeras pie darba. Rātsnamā kaut kas mistiski čīkst. Mērs Greitveja lūdz Rablam un Čārdžeram to atrast un salabot pirms viņas runas.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēnu iemīļotajām grāmatām iznācis turpinājums! Tām nav vietas bibliotēkā, tāpēc kucēniem jābūt radošiem!

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi - katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu - sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts - Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ceļojumā uz Parīzi ģimene apskatīs lielisko Luvru. Diemžēl Barbalala neievēro strikto noteikumu - muzejā neēst. // Barbalala strikti ievēro ačgārnās dienas tradīcijas, kas cēlušās no seniem laikiem. Brāļi un māsas pievienojas viņai ačgārnajā dienā.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabella pieskata Bali kaķēnus. Viņa baidās, kaut kas var noiet greizi, tāpēc nelaiž tos ārā. Barbamammai jāpalīdz kaķēniem.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Kaja dodas sērfot krāteros un izmēģina lielisku jaunu triku. // Tims un Kaja mēģina no jauna uzbūvēt kosmosa kuģi, kurā bērnībā rotaļājies tētis. // Tims cenšas atbrīvot māju no apnicīgas kosmosvaboles.

programme.title: Ķepaiņu lietas
programme.desc: Antropomorfisku dzīvnieku pasaulē Sems Snovs un Kita Keisija ir elitāri KLEID (Slepenā dzīvnieku detektīvu ekspertu līga) aģenti, kas apceļo pasauli un risina noslēpumus, liekot lietā problēmu risināšanas un dzīvnieku faktu pārzināšanas prasmes.

programme.title: Briežu komanda
programme.desc: Kosmosa stacijā notiek kas dīvains. Briežu komanda veic izmeklēšanu un atklāj, ka tajā mitinās nebēdnīgais Jokdaris. Džeida atrod Laika kristālu un ir spiesta iemācīties ar to apieties, lai atgrieztos pagātnē.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Pepa dodas uz zebras Zojas pidžamu ballīti kopā ar aitiņu Sūziju, trusīti Rebeku, kaķenīti Kendiju un zilonīti Emīliju. Meitenes spēlē spēles un izklaidējas. Beidzot viņām uznāk miegs. Viņas iekārtojas guļammaisos un aizmieg.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad futbola laukumā sarodas trušu ģimene, Rabla komanda liek lietā prasmes un izdomā jaunu sportu - trušbolu!

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Krokodilkungs un Deizija cenšas noskaidrot, kurš no draugiem aizņēmās spēli un neatgrieza to. Vai Pamātes diena izdosies, ir atkarīgs no tā, vai Deizija un Krokodilkungs atradīs bundžu attaisāmo.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vecākus pārsteidz aizvien vairāku reklāmas izkārtņu parādīšanās gar viņu ceļu. Gaisma no reklāmām ir tik spoža, ka naktī vairs nevar saskatīt zvaigznes un visur ir tik daudz stabu! Pietiks! Ģimenei jārīkojas! // Barbalala vēlas kļūt par kovbojmeiteni un Barbazū ir apņēmies viņai palīdzēt. Lai to panāktu, viņai jāiemācās aprūpēt govis un bulli. Tas nav viegli, bet, ja viņa pacentīsies, viņa būs lieliska kovbojmeitene.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija cenšas panākt, ka Omīte paliek, lai pavadītu vairāk laika kopā.

programme.desc: Kad Terija un Tomijs tiek ieslēgti Dārza kupolā, viņiem jāmet malā domstarpības, lai tiktu laukā.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais uzbūvē māju kokā. Barbamamma ir apņēmusies novērst piesārņojumu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērniem jāizlemj - doties baseinā vai izbraucienā ar riteņiem.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi - katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu - sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts - Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Pilsētā ierodas fermere, kas lūdz Rabla komandu uzcelt kūti viņas cūciņai. Vai suņuki paspēs to paveikt līdz lielajai Rukšu ballei? Motores īpašā dzimšanas dienas dāvana aizkavējas, jo izrādās, ka Celtnieklīcim vajadzīgs lielāks skrejceļš.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Miksa sapņo veikt mēness pārvērtības. Rabls un suņi piepilda viņas sapni ar jaunu raķeškuģa karuseli!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pārklāj māju ar burvju produktu, lai novērstu ūdens sūci. Nākamajā dienā māja saplok kā balons. Putns uzvij ligzdu uz Barbazū vēdera. Barbazū grib kļūt par lieu koku, lai sniegtu patvērumu dzīvniekiem. Situācija kļūst sarežģīta.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais uzbūvē māju kokā. Barbamamma ir apņēmusies novērst piesārņojumu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala saņem paciņu ar rozā zvēriņiem, ko nosauc par Skvīkijiem. Barbabravo, Barbalala un Barbabo ir apnicis, ka brāļi un māsas par viņiem smejas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ir Barbamazuļu dzimšanas diena. Viņi katrs grib kaut ko citādu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda strādā, lai pārvērstu Celtnieklīča pludmales promenādi spožā, svinīgā ziemas brīnumzemē. Kad sniegota diena izjauc Motores un Miksas Virpuļvāveres plānus, Rabla komanda dara to, ko prot vislabāk... būvē.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcī tiek uzbūvēta pirmā viesnīca, kad ciemos atbrauc fermeres Zojas brālēns Hedlijs. Kad juceklis uz dabas takas apmulsina visus Dakija Dū kunga dzimšanas dienas ballītes viesus, ķepaiņi viņiem palīdz atrast ceļu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Dullo vecāku" galvenais varonis ir desmit gadus vecs zēns Timijs, kurš dzīvo izdomātā pilsētā Dimsdeilā, un tur viņam neklājas viegli. Timija dzīve ir bēdīga, jo vecāki reti kad ir mājās, viņu pieskata Vikija, 16 gadus veca ļauna auklīte, viņš pastāvīgi tiek apsmiets, viņu moka arī skolotājs Krokera kungs. Bet viss mainās, kad viņam uzrodas divi laumiņu krustvecāki - Kosmo, viņa sieva Vanda un vēlāk - viņu dēls Pufs. Timijs apjauš, ka laumiņu krustvecāki noteiktās robežās spēj piepildīt visas viņa vēlēšanās. Tomēr Timijs vēl ir maziņš un reizēm ievēlas ko tādu, kas netīši noved pie nepatikšanām.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Dullo vecāku" galvenais varonis ir desmit gadus vecs zēns Timijs, kurš dzīvo izdomātā pilsētā Dimsdeilā, un tur viņam neklājas viegli. Timija dzīve ir bēdīga, jo vecāki reti kad ir mājās, viņu pieskata Vikija, 16 gadus veca ļauna auklīte, viņš pastāvīgi tiek apsmiets, viņu moka arī skolotājs Krokera kungs.
